calendar.matters:
Verified Petition For Order Determining Trust Ownership Of Property And Supporting Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Dec-21-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Sarah King for Trustees.

The Court stated that one piece of property (Roman Consoles) was acquired after the general assignment and that it will be excluded. Ms. King provided a revised order that itemizes all of the antiques. The Court informed Counsel the roman consoles will come out of the order. The Court granted the Petition for Order Determining Trust Ownership of Property, etc. (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.

Verified Petition For Order Determining Trust Ownership Of Property And Supporting Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Nov-06-2018 Continued To Dec-18-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
